oily.description: Oily skin produces excess sebum, leading to a shiny appearance and potential acne breakouts.

dry.description: Dry skin lacks sufficient moisture, often feeling tight and appearing flaky.

recommendations.moisturizer: Rich, emollient moisturizer with hyaluronic acid

combination.description: Combination skin has both oily and dry areas, typically oily T-zone and dry cheeks.

sensitive.description: Sensitive skin is prone to irritation and requires gentle care.

recommendations.serum: Centella Asiatica Serum (e.g., Purito Unscented Serum)

acne.description: A skin condition characterized by red pimples, often due to inflamed or infected sebaceous glands.

hyperpigmentation.description: Darkened areas on the skin caused by excess melanin production.
